title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: Five techniques for reducing AI hallucinations and token waste in agent systems. They cover semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation to catch silent failures, symbolic guardrails implemented in code, and runtime steering for agent self-correction.
